title: Ship MCP Server Definitions
description: Schema for .ship/mcp.jsonc — shared MCP server definitions referenced by agent configs via mcp.servers.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

servers.description: Server definitions keyed by server ID.

McpServerEntry.description: An MCP server definition. For stdio servers, command is required. For http/sse servers, url is required.

id.description: Server identifier. Defaults to the object key in the servers map.

command.description: Binary to run for stdio servers, e.g. npx, ship, node.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the server binary.

env.description: Environment variables for the server process.

url.description: URL for http or sse transport servers. Required when server_type is http or sse.

scope.description: Server scope — project-local or globally available.

server_type.description: Transport type. stdio runs a local process; http and sse connect to a URL.

disabled.description: When true, the server is retained but not activated during compilation.

codex_enabled_tools.description: Codex-only: tool names to enable for this server.

codex_disabled_tools.description: Codex-only: tool names to disable for this server.

gemini_trust.description: Gemini-only: whether this server is trusted.

gemini_include_tools.description: Gemini-only: tool names to include from this server.

gemini_exclude_tools.description: Gemini-only: tool names to exclude from this server.

cursor_env_file.description: Cursor-only: path to an env file to load for this stdio server.
